title: Fvcraft
description: This is a mod that I made nearly 5 years ago in mcreator for fun
body:
This is a mod that I made with mcreator in 2020 just for fun.

It adds:

- plasma liquid: better lava and is _**blue**_

- plasma: like magma blocks but _**blue**_ and does a lot of damage

- plasma rock: just like netherrack but **_blue_**... and that's it

- candy corn: a food that gives you speed and haste

- new enchants: I also added new enchants than poisons the enemy or strike lightning at the enemy

- Fvore: a new ore that is rarer than diamond and is more powerful than netherite.

- and some more stuff...

This mod isn't complete and I lost the mcreator file so if I don't learn java, it might never be. (it's just some crafting recipes to be honest)
